🔧 SYSTEM STATUS & NEXT STEPS
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Current Operating Mode: QUEUE-READY (no live DM source yet)

To Enable Live DM Ingestion (select one):

1. EMAIL FORWARDING (Recommended) ⭐
   Setup Time: 15 minutes
   Method: Forward YouTube DMs to email → Parser script processes
   Best For: Steady DM flow, email-native workflows
   Script: youtube-dm-email-parser.py (creates on demand)
   
2. WEBHOOK RECEIVER (Real-time) 
   Setup Time: 20 minutes
   Method: External DM service POSTs to webhook → Auto-processes
   Best For: Instant notifications, always-on monitoring
   Script: youtube-dm-webhook.py (creates on demand)

3. MANUAL QUEUE (Immediate)
   Setup Time: 2 minutes
   Method: Drop DMs into .cache/youtube-dm-inbox.jsonl manually
   Best For: Testing, low-volume operations, development
   Status: Ready now

4. YOUTUBE API OAUTH (Native Integration)
   Setup Time: 30 minutes
   Method: Direct YouTube API authentication + DM fetching
   Best For: Full automation, production deployment
   Requires: Google Cloud Console credentials

Current Recommendation: Use EMAIL FORWARDING for immediate production use
